_comment: Hero-image library manifest. Each entry is fetched from Wikimedia Commons by .github/workflows/fetch-heroes.yml (the build sandbox cannot reach Commons) and committed as assets/heroes/<slug>.jpg. Editions reference the committed copies via raw.githubusercontent, so images never break for readers. Add entries (exact Commons 'File:' name, minus the prefix) + push to main; the Action does the rest. Failed fetches are skipped, never faked.
